pi_items.source: Hardcoded in setup_task.sh line 10, export_result.sh line 9, and seed_demodb.py line 195 as synthetic profile seed data
Hardcoded in setup_task.sh line 11, export_result.sh line 10, and used consistently in anonymization logic
Hardcoded in export_result.sh line 11 and referenced in task description

privileged_info_summary: The task targets a synthetic user profile with email john.smith@example.com that is created and seeded in the demodb OrientDB database during environment setup. The GDPR erasure operation renames the user and changes the email to erased_john_smith@agency.local, and creates an audit log at /home/ga/gdpr_audit.txt. All profile data (name John Smith, birthday 1985-03-15, nationality American, gender Male, hotel stays at The Plaza Hotel and Hotel Adlon Kempinski, friendships with maria.garcia@example.com and david.jones@example.com, and restaurant visits at Per Se) is synthetically generated from hardcoded seed data in the environment setup scripts, not derived from real-world sources.
